summary: Remastered soundboard mix offers a full‑bodied, mostly clear recording with occasional hiss, capturing an inspired 1984 NYE show highlighted by a soaring Shakedown Street and stellar Scarlet > Fire on the Mountain.
review: The SBD remaster sounds rich and lively despite some tape hiss in “Women” and “Space,” and a few tracks retain that FM‑mix character. Musically the performance is vibrant – a 17‑minute Shakedown Street opener, a fiery Scarlet > Fire sequence, Spanish Jam, and standout renditions of Peggy‑O and Jack Straw make this one of ’84’s memorable New Year’s Eve shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments about both the performance and the remastered soundboard, with only minor recording quirks noted; overall enthusiasm across five detailed reviews supports a strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Remaster is full‑bodied and clear; occasional tape hiss in “Women” and some “Space,” plus a few tracks sounding like FM mix (Ultramix) rather than pure board, but overall very listenable.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire On The Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic 17‑minute Shakedown start, smooth transitions into Scarlet > Fire and Spanish Jam mid‑set, with inventive (if unfinished) UJB moment near the end; overall pacing praised as inspired and engaging.
